title: Hyderabad: Married Woman, With Son's Help, Kills Lover
description: Siva Reddy, 40, a native of Annamayya district in Andhra Pradesh, had been in a live-in relationship with a woman for the last 10 years. The woman's son, aged 19 years, has also been living with them. For the last few months, Siva Reddy has been harassing both of them
